name: Cathe's Crawfish Etouffe
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onion and bell pepper; sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Add garlic and celery; continue sautéing until vegetables are tender, about 10 minutes.
4. Stir in green onions, garlic salt, parsley, red pepper flakes, pepper, and Tabasco sauce. Cook for 2-3 minutes.
5. Add the cleaned crawfish to the skillet; cook for an additional minute.
6. Sprinkle flour over the mixture; stir to combine.
7. Gradually add chicken broth, stirring constantly until well incorporated.
8. Reduce heat to low and simmer uncovered for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
9. Serve the etouffe over hot cooked rice.
